title: Prepare controlled SW-003 live proof plan
goal: Add a concrete non-mutating plan/runbook for the eventual controlled SW-003 live proof, including required Miro tool checks, allowed scope, evidence fields, abort criteria and redaction requirements.

acceptance.assertion: Plan specifies that the live Miro MCP tool catalogue must be checked before cleanup/update claims.
Plan separates preparation from actual live mutation and requires explicit operator approval for live action.
Plan maps create/read/update/verify/idempotency/cleanup evidence to sanitized public receipt fields.
